title: Using Formular as DATE
excerpt:
Hi guys! 
I want to make an automation, that moves an item from one group to another when passes a date, set from a formula, is this still not possible?

posts.author: Kristoffer (Kristoffer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi guys!

I want to make an automation, that moves an item from one group to another when passes a date, set from a formula, is this still not possible?

posts.author: GillesEXO (Gilles BAULARD)
posts.cookedHtml:
This question seem to be around for a while.

Looks that there is no solution.

I am more and more dispointed by Monday, as the limitations are crippling any automation possibility.

Basic things such as moving an item or calulating are so limited that they tend to by useless…

posts.author: Kristoffer (Kristoffer)
posts.cookedHtml:
So i solved this problem by using General Caster.
This makes me able to use a formula, and convert the formula to a date column.

Then i had no problem making the automation.

Later i found out i didnt have to use a date from a formula. But its possible
